channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four, beating Duke 54-50 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Chloe Kitts scored 14 points and defending national champion South Carolina reached the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament for a fifth straight year, beating Duke 54-50 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Torpedo-shaped bats draw attention after Yankees hit team-record 9 homers in rout of Brewers
item.description: New torpedo bats drew attention when the New York Yankees hit a team-record nine homers that traveled a combined 3,695 feet.
item.dc:creator: Larry Fleisher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blue Jays put 3-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer on IL because of right thumb inflammation
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The Toronto Blue Jays put right-hander Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list Sunday because of inflammation in his right thumb. The move comes one day after the three-time Cy Young Award winner left his debut start with Toronto after three innings because of right lat soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Can Villanova rise into a championship contender again? Wildcats bank on Kevin Willard to lead them
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Kevin Willard publicly campaigned — pleaded, really — during Maryland's run to the Sweet 16 for more from the university and athletic department for his Big Ten program.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hometown kid Leroux leads Quakes’ effort in 1-1 draw with Sounders
item.description: Quakes' 21-year-old rookie scores his first MLS goal for San Jose, which had lost three straight matches.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: Bueckers has career-high 40 to lead one-woman March Madness rout for UConn, 82-59 over Oklahoma
item.description: Paige Bueckers scored a career-high 40 points, rescuing UConn from its first-half doldrums and single-handedly turning a tight game against Oklahoma into an 82-59 rout that sent the Huskies to the Elite Eight of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blue Jays manager John Schneider drops F-bomb in hot mic moment with umpire
item.description: Toronto Blue Jays manager John Schneider voiced his displeasure with home plate umpire Will Little's call in the first inning, and the whole world heard it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: NCAA Tournament regionals: A look at Chicagoland connections, program history and more for the men's basketball Sweet 16
item.description: The 2025 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament resumes Thursday night, and it's down to the Sweet 16. It'll be the Elite Eight after the regional semifinals on Thursday and Friday and then the Final Four after the regional finals on Saturday and Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Stanford football coach Troy Taylor fired after allegations
item.description: (KRON) -- Stanford football head coach Troy Taylor has been fired, team officials announced Tuesday, following a report that he was investigated twice for allegedly mistreating staffers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nine-man Monarchs come from behind twice to stun Rapids 2 in shootout victory
item.description: It was a rough start for the Monarchs on Sunday, but they still claimed a shootout victory against their Rocky Mountain rivals.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Ryan Donato, Connor Bedard lead Blackhawks over Flyers 7-4
item.description: Ryan Donato scored twice, Connor Bedard had a goal and an assist, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Philadelphia Flyers 7-4 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hall, Kitts rally top-seeded South Carolina to Sweet 16 in 64-53 March Madness win over Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Bree Hall had 11 points and Chloe Kitts scored all her 10 points in the second half as top seed South Carolina pulled away after trailing at halftime to beat ninth-seeded Indiana 64-53 on Sunday in the women’s NCAA Tournament and reach the Sweet 16 for the 11th straight time.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5
